#### Endpoint Detail

**`POST /api/v1/resource`**

Request body:
```json
{
  "field": "string",
  "optionalField": "string | undefined"
}
```

Response (201 Created):
```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "field": "string",
  "createdAt": "ISO 8601 string"
}
```

Error responses: `400 Bad Request`, `404 Not Found`, `409 Conflict`
